etymology.description: phonetic: 冎 (guā, "bone") + semantic: 口 (kǒu, "mouth") -> phonetic component
etymology.interpretation: The character 咼(咼) (guō) is a phono-semantic compound where 冎(冎) (guā) provides the sound, and 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") contributes the idea, often used as a phonetic element in other characters.
